title: Sub In Fast Winger on Right
description: The opponent's Left Back is exhausted and carrying a yellow card. A fresh pacey winger will force errors.

title: Change Studs for Midfielders
description: Pitch is getting heavier due to rain. 3 players slipped in the first half. Switch to SG (Soft Ground) studs.

title: Exploit Central Space
description: Instruct the Playmaker to operate higher up in Zone 14. Their defensive mids are failing to track back quickly.
